summary: Iteration 7 — Testing Contact.jsx refactor (warm design harmonisation, email .fr→.com, option 29/45/69, 3 délai cards, SSL SMTP Hostinger). Backend 100% (6/6). Frontend: 14/16 checks pass. 2 failures: phone field still has old styles (border-neutral-300, rounded-md, focus:ring-amber-700) and phone label has text-foreground class — both in Contact.jsx lines 159+168.

ui_bugs.issue: Phone input (id='phone') still has old classes: 'rounded-md border border-neutral-300 focus:ring-amber-700 focus:border-transparent'. Should be harmonized to rounded-xl + style={{ borderColor: '#E2DFD8' }} like all other inputs. No inline style for borderColor set.
Phone label (for='phone') has className containing 'text-foreground' ('block text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-2'). Should use inline style={{ color: '#2C352D' }} like all other labels.

action_items: Fix Contact.jsx line 159: Replace phone label className (remove 'text-foreground') → className='block text-sm font-medium mb-2' style={{ color: '#2C352D' }}

Fix Contact.jsx line 168: Replace phone input className/style → className='flex h-10 w-full rounded-xl border bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-colors' style={{ borderColor: '#E2DFD8', color: '#2C352D' }}
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx: Téléphone field (line 159-170) was NOT updated during this refactor iteration. The label uses text-foreground and the input uses border-neutral-300/rounded-md/focus:ring-amber-700 — inconsistent with all other form fields that use #E2DFD8 border + rounded-xl.
Backend email_service.py: SMTP_SSL (line 148) correctly used for Hostinger port 465 SSL — implementation is correct.
Backend .env: SMTP_HOST=smtp.hostinger.com, SMTP_PORT=465, SMTP_USE_SSL=true — all correct for Hostinger.
Checkbox gdprConsent has border-neutral-300 class — this is standard for checkbox styling and acceptable (does not affect border-color visual since checkboxes render differently).

success_rate.frontend: 87.5% (14/16 checks pass; 2 failures on phone field styling)

test_credentials: Admin: /admin/login, password JQi]=3+8Azc4 (not needed for contact form tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iterations 1-7 all tested Espace Agenda V3. This iteration found 2 remaining issues in Contact.jsx phone field (lines 159 and 168) — label has text-foreground, input has border-neutral-300/rounded-md/focus:ring-amber-700 instead of harmonized warm design. All other Contact.jsx requirements pass. Backend /api/contact 100%. SMTP SSL config for Hostinger correct. data-testids present. 3 delay cards rendering correctly on #F4F0E8 with #FFFFFF cards.
